types:type.name: create-customer-example
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type create_customer_example = {| firstName: String, lastName: String, email: String |} {"example": "{\\\"firstName\\\":\\\"John\\\",\\\"lastName\\\":\\\"Doe\\\",\\\"email\\\":\\\"john.doe@example.com\\\"}"}

types:type.name: customer-example
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type customer_example = {| id: String, firstName: String, lastName: String, email: String |} {"example": "{\\\"id\\\":\\\"1\\\",\\\"firstName\\\":\\\"John\\\",\\\"lastName\\\":\\\"Doe\\\",\\\"email\\\":\\\"john.doe@example.com\\\"}"}
